addSelectedBtn.description: Button label to confirm adding the selected timezone

addTimezoneBtn.description: Button text to open timezone selector

cancelBtn.description: Button label to cancel the add-timezone dialog

collapseBtn.description: Button text for collapsing Convert Time section

convertTitle.description: Title label for the Convert Time section

convertedTimesLabel.description: Label shown above the list of converted times

copyAllBtn.description: Button text to copy all conversion results

copyThisTimeTitle.description: Tooltip for copy button in conversion result rows

copyToClipboardTitle.description: Tooltip for copy buttons in the clock list

errorEnterDatetime.description: Error shown when datetime input is missing

errorInvalidDatetime.description: Error shown when datetime parsing fails
errorInvalidDatetime.message: 날짜/시간 형식이 올바르지 않습니다. 예: 2024-08-04 15:30 또는 Aug 4, 2024 3:30 PM

errorSelectSourceTimezone.description: Error shown when source timezone is missing

extDescription.message: 브라우저에서 UTC 시간과 세계 시계를 확인하세요. 시간대 및 로케일 지원, 시간 변환 기능 포함.

extShortName.description: The short name of the extension

localLabel.description: Label for local timezone in selectors/displays

popupTitle.description: Title shown in the popup HTML <title>

selectSourceTimezoneOption.description: Default option label for source timezone selector

sourceLabel.description: Label for the input source line in conversion results

timezoneSearchPlaceholder.description: Placeholder text in the timezone search filter input

toggleConvertBtn.description: Button text for toggling Convert Time section
